title: athyrium schimperi subsp. biserrulatum
intro: Athyrium schimperi subsp. biserrulatum, also known as Schimperi's lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Schimperi's lady fern include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
